title: Quanta Services (PWR) Upgraded to Strong Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Quanta Services (PWR) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: Quanta Services Announces First Quarter 2023 Earnings Release & Conference Call Schedule
text: HOUSTON , April 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will release first quarter 2023 financial results on Thursday, May 4, 2023, before the market opens. In conjunction with the press release, Quanta has scheduled a conference call and webcast for 9:00 a.m.
